requirements.summary: Create a centered multi-line text input area with placeholder text
acceptanceCriteria: Text area is displayed with appropriate height for multi-line input
Placeholder text 'Enter your text here...' appears when empty
User can type and edit text in the text area

file_operations.description: Add a centered textarea element with placeholder 'Enter your text here...' configured for multi-line input with appropriate height and styling

requirements.summary: Implement UPPERCASE button to convert text to uppercase
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the button converts all text in the text area to uppercase
Original text is replaced with the uppercase version

file_operations.description: Add an UPPERCASE button with click handler that converts the textarea value to uppercase using toUpperCase() and updates the textarea content

requirements.summary: Implement lowercase button to convert text to lowercase
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the button converts all text in the text area to lowercase
Original text is replaced with the lowercase version

file_operations.description: Add a lowercase button with click handler that converts the textarea value to lowercase using toLowerCase() and updates the textarea content

requirements.summary: Apply clean, modern design with centered layout and minimalist aesthetic
acceptanceCriteria: All elements are centered horizontally on the page
Consistent spacing between text area and buttons
Design uses a cohesive color scheme with good contrast

file_operations.description: Apply centered layout using Tailwind utility classes with flex column, center alignment, and consistent spacing between textarea and buttons
Configure global styles for minimalist aesthetic using neutral colors, simple typography, and ensure good contrast for readability
